About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Who I am
About.welcome: Learn about my story and experience
About.who: I'm a software engineer with over 20 years of experience in architecture, full-stack development, and automation with a strong focus on artificial intelligence.
About.p1: Currently, I extensively use IDEs with artificial intelligence for code generation to accelerate high-impact deliveries, working almost exclusively on creating AI-assisted features.
About.p2: I use AI as a copilot in virtually every delivery. From feature design to deployment, including refactors, API integrations, test generation, and pipelines.
About.skill1_desc: Modern software engineering (SOLID, TDD, DDD, Clean Architecture)
About.skill2_desc: Development with focus on AI integration
About.skill3_desc: Infrastructure with AWS, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes
About.skill4_desc: Integrations with AI models and generative flows to automate processes

Services.title: My Services
Services.subtitle: What I do
Services.service1Desc: Development of intelligent systems with LLM integration and generative AI for process automation.
Services.service2Desc: Creation of SaaS platforms with high-performance backends and scalable architecture.
Services.service3Desc: Web service development, following modern software engineering practices.
Services.service4Desc: Consulting for implementing AI-assisted workflows and process automation with OpenAI.
Services.cta: Contact me to discuss your project
